title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, long-context workflows, and multimodal tasks. It supports up to one-million-token context windows and is compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic API endpoints. The MiniMax Code platform includes Agent Team features for collaborative multi-agent workflows.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents, long-context workflows, and multimodal tasks, positioned as an alternative to Claude and Codex. The concrete points: M3 supports context windows up to one million tokens and is compatible with both OpenAI and Anthropic API endpoints, which eases integration into existing setups. The MiniMax Code platform adds Agent Team features for collaborative multi-agent workflows. For developers tracking open-weights options against proprietary coding tools, the API compatibility and long-context support are the notable details.
